query:
ALTER TABLE paperTrades ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS executionSlippage DOUBLE DEFAULT 0 COMMENT 'gap slippage: actualExit - intendedExit';
ALTER TABLE paperTrades ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS gapExecution TINYINT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '1 if filled at open due to gap';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2fRMU9WuDe4UzGh.6d94b4c6929d --database MmWmJbH77mYYXTZazVYpbM --execute ALTER TABLE paperTrades ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS executionSlippage DOUBLE DEFAULT 0 COMMENT 'gap slippage: actualExit - intendedExit';
ALTER TABLE paperTrades ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS gapExecution TINYINT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '1 if filled at open due to gap';
